3070980.name: Dream Pinball 3D - Digital Deluxe Content
3070980.description:
Enhance your Dream Pinball 3D experience with the Digital Deluxe DLC!

This exclusive add-on includes an extensive Pinball Magazine (PDF) featuring a complete pinball lexicon from A to Z, fascinating background information on the history and creation of pinball machines, as well as tips and tricks from professional players.

In addition, the Digital Deluxe DLC contains 15 Full HD wallpapers, a double-sided A1 poster (PDF, 59.4 × 83.9 cm) featuring the pinball cover artwork and detailed descriptions of all six pinball tables, a multilingual glossary in English, German, and French, as well as an exclusive sketchbook.

The 36-page Sketchbook (PDF) presents detailed sketches and design studies of numerous elements from all six pinball tables, offering an in-depth look into the creative development process behind Dream Pinball 3D.

Digital Deluxe DLC Contents:

18-page Pinball Magazine (PDF) in English, German, and Russian

36-page Sketchbook (PDF) with sketches and detail drawings of the six pinball tables

25 Full HD wallpapers

Trilingual glossary in English, German, and French

Double-sided A1 poster (PDF)
3070980.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 匈牙利语, 捷克语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
